title: Animal and Plant Health Agency annual report and accounts, 2023 to 2024
body: "The report includes a financial review and statements for the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA) for the financial year 2023 to 2024.  It also includes an overview of the agency’s performance and achievements.  The print version of the annual report and accounts is the version officially signed by APHA’s Accounting Officer and the National Audit Office, and the version laid in Parliament. "
